text:
Night of The End is the 7th track on the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack 02, as well as the 7th track on disc 2 of the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack Complete Album. It was composed and arranged by Kohta Yamamoto.

Musical motifs

At 2:48-3:13, the track incorporates the melody from Ashes on The Fire (1:50-2:04). 

All occurrences

Episode 77 - The Scouts try to figure out why Eren would do what he is doing
Episode 87 - The Scouts discuss with the Azumabito how to sway the Marleyans' opinion of the Eldians
